title: Mutual-aid shift handover sheet
summary: Record people present, urgent risks, completed tasks, open tasks, supplies, equipment faults, vulnerable-person checks, and next decisions.
content: Record people present, urgent risks, completed tasks, open tasks, supplies, equipment faults, vulnerable-person checks, and next decisions. Read the handover aloud and require the incoming lead to repeat the top three priorities. Do not let a tired person leave before critical hazards and missing people are acknowledged.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Mutual-aid shift handover sheet”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Mutual-aid shift handover sheet»
steps: Record people present, urgent risks, completed tasks, open tasks, supplies, equipment faults, vulnerable-person checks, and next decisions.
Read the handover aloud and require the incoming lead to repeat the top three priorities.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Mutual-aid shift handover sheet.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Mutual-aid shift handover sheet.
warnings: Do not let a tired person leave before critical hazards and missing people are acknowledged.
Official instructions and trained responders override this offline card for Mutual-aid shift handover sheet.
common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Mutual-aid shift handover sheet.
Failing to update the plan when conditions change during Mutual-aid shift handover sheet.
alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Mutual-aid shift handover sheet.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Mutual-aid shift handover sheet.
The action creates a new hazard or delays qualified help during Mutual-aid shift handover sheet.
when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Mutual-aid shift handover sheet.
short_term: For Mutual-aid shift handover sheet, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Mutual-aid shift handover sheet, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Mutual-aid shift handover sheet, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Mutual-aid shift handover sheet to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
sources: CDC — Water, sanitation and hygiene emergencies: https://www.cdc.gov/water-emergency/index.html
CDC — Keep food safe after an emergency: https://www.cdc.gov/food-safety/foods/keep-food-safe-after-emergency.html
American Red Cross — First aid steps: https://www.redcross.org/take-a-class/first-aid/performing-first-aid/first-aid-steps
